Document:
# Survival Basics
[textlink="View Full Wiki Page" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Survival%20Basics"/]
## Survival Basics
Life in the Wasteland is hostile by default. Food, water, radiation, and weather all matter - neglecting any of them for too long will kill you.
To survive long term, you need [bold]food[/bold] and [bold]water[/bold]. The day-night cycle lasts one hour, and during that span you need to eat and drink at least once.
Clean water is one of the most important resources in Nuclear 14. Many water sources are dirty or irradiated, so drinking whatever you find is a fast way to get sick.
[bold]Water Type[/bold] [bold]Safety[/bold] [bold]Filtered Water[/bold] Safe to drink. Purified from a clean source. [bold]Dirty Water[/bold] Illness risk. Carries bacteria and contaminants. [bold]Irradiated Water[/bold] Radiation exposure. Avoid unless treated.
Purify water with filters, chemistry, or boiling whenever you can. See [textlink="Materials" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Materials"/] for water purification recipes.
You need a steady food supply. Gather wild plants, hunt animals, trade for supplies, or grow crops if your settlement has the space.
Cook raw meat before eating it - raw meat carries illness risk.
Do not assume every plant or scavenged meal is safe.
See [textlink="Cooking" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Cooking"/] for meal recipes and [textlink="Botany" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Botany"/] for growing your own food supply.
[bold]Quick food options:[/bold]
[bold]Raw plants[/bold] (carrots, cabbage, corn) - safe to eat immediately.
[bold]Pre-war packaged food[/bold] (Blamco, Cram, Instamash) - safe and filling.
[bold]Cooked meals[/bold] - best value for nutrition and safety.
Radiation is everywhere in the Wasteland. Watch your exposure levels, carry treatment when possible, and avoid contaminated areas unless you are equipped for them.
[bold]Tool / Treatment[/bold] [bold]Use[/bold] [bold]Geiger Counter[/bold] Measures current radiation level in your environment. [bold]RadAway Inhaler[/bold] Flushes accumulated radiation from your body. See [textlink="Medicine Crafting" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Medicine_Crafting"/] to craft your own. [bold]Rad-X[/bold] Reduces radiation absorption rate while active. Found in medical caches or purchased from doctors.
If a zone is hot: move quickly, wear protection, and clear the dose before it stacks up.
Weather can be as deadly as combat. Sandstorms, acid rain, and sharp temperature swings all punish unprepared survivors.
[bold]Gear[/bold] [bold]Protection[/bold] [bold]Gas Mask[/bold] Covers airways during sandstorms and toxic environments. [bold]Leather Duster Coat[/bold] Full-body weather protection for open Wasteland travel.
Keep protective clothing, a face covering, and spare supplies ready before you travel far from shelter.
